content.problemStatement:
Chef is really interested in the XOR operation. He wants to take a sequence A0,A1,…,AN−1A_0, A_1, \ldots, A_{N-1}A0​,A1​,…,AN−1​ and for each iii from 000 to K−1K-1K−1 inclusive (in this order, one by one), perform the following operation:


Let's denote a=Ai%Na = A_{i\%N}a=Ai%N​ and b=AN−(i%N)−1b = A_{N-(i\%N)-1}b=AN−(i%N)−1​ before this operation.
Change Ai%NA_{i\%N}Ai%N​ to a⊕ba \oplus ba⊕b, i.e. aaa XOR bbb.
Since Chef is busy, he asked you to find the final sequence he should get after performing these operations.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and KKK.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A0,A1,…,AN−1A_0, A_1, \ldots, A_{N-1}A0​,A1​,…,AN−1​.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing NNN space-separated integers ― the elements of the final sequence.
